source: Sohn Hearts & Minds Australia 2021 — Stock pick: Coinbase (COIN) — Coinbase Cloud as the AWS of crypto / web3 infra
summary: Crypto/web3 will drive significantly more technological disruption over the next 20-30 years than the prior decade's cloud/AI/SaaS cycle
summary_extended: Baker argues that the crypto and web3 era will produce significantly more technological disruption over the next 20-30 years than the prior decade's cloud, AI, and SaaS cycle combined, which he characterizes as comparatively 'stable' by comparison. His reasoning centers on programmable blockchains opening a vastly larger design space for new applications and business models, implying that the magnitude of disruption ahead is systematically underestimated by most investors. The investment implication is that early-positioned crypto infrastructure providers — specifically Coinbase, which Baker frames as the 'AWS of crypto' or the foundational cloud layer for web3 — will capture outsized value as this cycle unfolds. Baker presents this macro structural view as the primary backdrop justifying a long position in COIN, with no specific numerical targets cited but a multi-decade conviction timeframe.
detail: Baker characterizes the prior decade's technology environment as comparatively 'stable,' dominated by cloud, AI, and SaaS. He expects programmable blockchains to open a much larger and more disruptive design space, implying that investors underestimate the magnitude of disruption ahead and that infrastructure providers positioned early will capture outsized value.
confidence_evidence: Stated as a directional macro view supporting the COIN thesis; not quantified with specific metrics but framed with conviction as a structural backdrop
quote_fragment: significantly more technological disruption driven by the crypto world over the coming decades

ticker_audit.reasoning: Coinbase is the explicit stock pick and the direct subject of this thesis — Baker's web3 infrastructure disruption view is specifically used to justify owning COIN as the AWS-equivalent of crypto infrastructure.
